MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No one.
There being no appearance by attorney Henry Glasser or petitioner Mary Lou Fink, an Order to Appear will be issued to the Petitioner and the Attorney to appear on July 6, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The accounting hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
